title: zornia mitziana
intro: Zornia mitziana, also known as wild velvet bean, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Zornia mitziana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
